headline: ₹100-400 Cr at risk over project lifecycle if ESG-driven capital costs rise or FII outflows occur. — Adani Power wins 3.2 GW Assam coal tender, reinforcing fossil fuel portfolio amid moderate ESG risk.
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], TCFD, CDP, GRI frameworks triggered; non-disclosure could lead to SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
Possible P/E compression (5-10%) if FII outflows occur due to ESG concerns; margin impact not immediate.
Potential for higher cost of capital (+20-40bps) if ESG disclosures are weak or fossil fuel exposure increases.
